decision: Proceed with implementation after dependency gate check
reason: RD-004 depends only on RD-003, and RD-003 is DONE; no cross-epic blockers declared
impact: Work can start without blocked state

decision: Use Django admin computed analytics fields instead of schema changes
reason: RD-004 requires operational visibility in admin UI, not persistence model changes
impact: Fast delivery with low migration risk and immediate diagnostics value

decision: Add list/search/filter/select_related and card diagnostics for installations
reason: DoD requires list visibility and card-level analytics for troubleshooting
impact: Operators can quickly find installations and inspect auth/installation health

decision: Use /api/admin/ as canonical Django admin URL on VPS
reason: Public /admin/* path is served by Nuxt frontend and causes perceived white screen
impact: Operator access path is now deterministic and matches backend routing

decision: Work around JSONField conversion issue for status_code in admin
reason: Legacy table + runtime adapter returned dict and caused 500 in changelist
impact: Installations list is stable in production admin

decision: Normalize installation age calculation for naive datetimes
reason: Change page failed with naive/aware subtraction TypeError
impact: Installation card analytics now render without runtime errors

reason: Django 5.2 no longer exposes django.utils.timezone.utc, causing 500 in Bitrix24Account changelist
impact: Bitrix24Account admin list now opens and renders token expiry analytics

decision: Close RD-004 and complete EPIC-FND after UAT confirmation
reason: User confirmed admin UX works in production and requested formal closure
impact: Roadmap status moved to DONE, Bitrix kanban synced, EPIC-FND completion synchronized

decision: Re-run dependency gate before reopened RD-004 iteration
reason: Task was moved back to IN_PROGRESS and requires strict gate validation against depends_on=RD-003
impact: Confirmed unblocked state and preserved compliance with blocked workflow

decision: Freeze final UI decisions until UX/data clarification from user
reason: Reopened scope explicitly requests modernized admin list/card UX but exact data density and design accents are not yet specified
impact: Next implementation step will be requirement-aligned and avoid rework in Django admin templates/configuration

decision: Use django-unfold as first-stage modernization baseline
reason: Need quick visual upgrade of Django admin before deeper card/list UX customization
impact: Admin gets modern UI foundation while preserving current operational diagnostics logic

decision: Adopt incremental migration with existing admin classes
reason: Minimize regression risk by keeping current fields/filters/actions and only switching ModelAdmin base plus settings
impact: Safe rollout path: style layer first, information architecture iteration next

decision: Prioritize status and auth indicators in list-level UX
reason: Admin operators need fast triage signals before opening detail page
impact: List view now surfaces status/auth health/token TTL in first screen

decision: Use lightweight inline badge rendering instead of custom templates in stage 2
reason: Need modern readability with minimal implementation risk and no template override complexity
impact: Improved visual scanning while keeping admin customization maintainable

decision: Isolate EPIC-FND implementation in dedicated git branch
reason: A second agent works in parallel on EPIC-2 and branch isolation prevents accidental overwrite
impact: RD-004 changes can be merged independently via PR/cherry-pick without cross-epic collisions

decision: Merge isolated RD-004 branch into master before user verification
reason: User requested single master line for test while preserving parallel EPIC-2 safety
impact: Changes are available on master and still traceable through dedicated feature branch

decision: Move RD-004 to TESTING and restart backend on VPS
reason: After merge and push, runtime needed controlled restart so user can verify admin UI immediately
impact: Deployment health restored (HEALTH=200) and task state reflects verification phase
